Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: Micro-and meso-structures and their influence on mechanical properties of selectively laser melted Ti-6Al-4V

Composition_Info.Note: Standard Ti-6Al-4V nominal composition; ELI grade powder used

Process_Text.original: EOSINT M 280 SLM unit with Yb:YAG fiber laser; argon gas environment; laser power 280 W; scan speed 1200 mm/s; scan spacing 0.14 mm; layer thickness 30 um; scan rotation 90 deg; volumetric energy density 55.6 J/mm3; post-SLM stress relieving anneal at 650 degC for 3 h
Process_Text.simplified: SLM with t=30 um, phi=90deg, J=55.6 J/mm3; stress relieved 650 C 3h

Process_Info.Equipment: EOSINT M 280 SLM unit with Yb:YAG fiber laser

Microstructure_Text.original: Fine acicular alpha/alpha' lath structure within prior beta grains; alpha phase decorated at prior beta grain boundaries; columnar grains spanning entire height in build direction; laths oriented at ~45 deg to BD due to Burger's orientation relationship; c/a ratio of alpha' = 1.589 vs alpha c/a = 1.59-1.6; epitaxial growth in <001>_beta direction
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Columnar prior beta grains with fine acicular alpha/alpha' laths; alpha at grain boundaries; laths at 45 deg to BD

Precipitates.Phase_Type: alpha phase at prior beta GBs

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; strain rate 0.001 /s; displacement control 0.006 mm/s
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8; dog-bone 6 mm gage length; 2x0.5 mm cross-section
Properties_Info.Note: Parallel to build direction; highest sigma_Y among all combinations

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; strain rate 0.001 /s
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8; dog-bone 6 mm gage length; 2x0.5 mm cross-section
Properties_Info.Note: Parallel to build direction

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; strain rate 0.001 /s
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8; dog-bone 6 mm gage length; 2x0.5 mm cross-section
Properties_Info.Note: Lowest ductility among all combinations; minimum aerospace requirement 5% satisfied

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; rotating bending fatigue; R=-1; fully reversed loading; 3 samples per stress level minimum 10^7 cycles survival
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Hourglass shaped; 22 mm gauge length; minimum diameter ~5 mm; mirror polished
Properties_Info.Note: FS/sigma_U ratio 0.28; poor fatigue properties typical of high J SLM alloys due to porosity

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; plane strain conditions confirmed; displacement rate 0.01 mm/s
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E399-12; Chevron notch C(T) specimen; 12 mm thick, 24 mm wide; a/W ~0.45-0.55
Properties_Info.Note: Similar to conventionally manufactured Ti64 (44-66 MPa sqrt(m))

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; da/dN = C(DeltaK)^m; R=0.1; 10 Hz sinusoidal
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E647-15; C(T) specimen
Properties_Info.Note: Lower than conventional Ti64 (3.2-5.8); higher FCG resistance in SLM Ti64
Typical poor unnotched fatigue of SLM alloys

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; load shedding method per ASTM E647-15; R=0.1; 10 Hz sinusoidal; da/dN threshold 2e-9 m/cycle
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E647-15; precracked C(T) specimen; a/W ~0.45-0.55
Properties_Info.Note: Relatively insensitive to mesostructure; similar to conventional Ti64 (5.4 MPa sqrt(m))

Composition_Info.Note: Standard Ti-6Al-4V nominal composition; ELI grade powder used

Process_Text.original: EOSINT M 280 SLM unit with Yb:YAG fiber laser; argon gas environment; laser power 280 W; scan speed 1200 mm/s; scan spacing 0.14 mm; layer thickness 30 um; scan rotation 67 deg; volumetric energy density 55.6 J/mm3; post-SLM stress relieving anneal at 650 degC for 3 h
Process_Text.simplified: SLM with t=30 um, phi=67deg, J=55.6 J/mm3; stress relieved 650 C 3h

Process_Info.Equipment: EOSINT M 280 SLM unit with Yb:YAG fiber laser

Microstructure_Text.original: Near-equiaxed prior beta grains in B-plane due to 67 deg scan rotation causing mismatch between successive laser tracks; columnar grains in S-plane with jagged discontinuous walls; fine acicular alpha/alpha' laths within prior beta grains; alpha phase at grain boundaries; melt pool boundaries do not overlap due to 67 deg rotation
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Near-equiaxed prior beta in B-plane; columnar with jagged walls in S-plane; fine alpha/alpha' laths

Precipitates.Phase_Type: alpha phase at prior beta GBs

Process_Text.original: EOSINT M 280 SLM unit with Yb:YAG fiber laser; argon gas environment; laser power 340 W; scan speed 1250 mm/s; scan spacing 0.12 mm; layer thickness 60 um; scan rotation 90 deg; volumetric energy density 37.8 J/mm3; post-SLM stress relieving anneal at 650 degC for 3 h
Process_Text.simplified: SLM with t=60 um, phi=90deg, J=37.8 J/mm3; stress relieved 650 C 3h

Process_Info.Equipment: EOSINT M 280 SLM unit with Yb:YAG fiber laser

Microstructure_Text.original: Square columnar prior beta grains in B-plane (side length ~120 um equals scan spacing); smaller J causes decreased melt pool size and formation of melt zone boundaries; epitaxy in BD is prevented; shortened vertical columnar grains in S-plane due to melt pool boundaries; fine acicular alpha/alpha' laths within prior beta grains
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Square columnar prior beta (smaller ~120 um); epitaxy broken; shortened columnar in S-plane; alpha/alpha' laths

Precipitates.Phase_Type: alpha phase at prior beta GBs

Properties_Info.Note: High strength; nearly isotropic (~3% difference with S6090)

Properties_Info.Note: Higher than t=30 um samples; FS/sigma_U ratio 0.37; due to lower J and smaller pores

Microstructure_Text.original: Square columnar prior beta grains in B-plane (side length ~120 um); epitaxy broken due to reduced J; shortened vertical columnar grains in S-plane due to melt pool boundaries; columnar grains still aligned along BD with near-linear boundaries; fine acicular alpha/alpha' laths
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Square columnar prior beta (~120 um); epitaxy broken; shortened columnar in S-plane with linear boundaries

Process_Text.original: EOSINT M 280 SLM unit with Yb:YAG fiber laser; argon gas environment; laser power 340 W; scan speed 1250 mm/s; scan spacing 0.12 mm; layer thickness 60 um; scan rotation 67 deg; volumetric energy density 37.8 J/mm3; post-SLM stress relieving anneal at 650 degC for 3 h

Process_Info.Equipment: EOSINT M 280 SLM unit with Yb:YAG fiber laser

Microstructure_Text.original: Equiaxed prior beta grains in B-plane (optimal mesostructure due to combined effect of 60 um layer and 67 deg rotation); irregular and short grain boundaries in S-plane; 67 deg rotation causes mismatch between successive layers preventing epitaxy; fine acicular alpha/alpha' laths within prior beta grains; lowest porosity (0.17%)
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Equiaxed prior beta in B-plane (optimal); irregular short boundaries in S-plane; lowest porosity 0.17%; fine alpha/alpha' laths

Precipitates.Phase_Type: alpha phase at prior beta GBs
